title: Non-record: Shared-Core 8/12 @ 896 on 1xH100 SXM (1.9998 val_bpb)
body:
This PR adds a non-record 16MB submission folder for a shared-core recurrent transformer validated on 1xH100 SXM.

Summary:
- primary run: `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb 1.99975632`
- repeat run: `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb 1.99970894`
- total submission size: `12,960,324` bytes on the primary run
- track: `non-record`, since this was validated on `1xH100` rather than the final `8xH100 / 10 minute` setting

Included artifacts:
- `README.md`
- `submission.json`
- `train.log`
- `train_repeat.log`
- `train_gpt.py`

No extra dependencies were used beyond the base repo stack for this run.
